zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Goring於1500年出生在英國素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨時，他的父親Sir John Goring IV30歲，母親Constance Dyke25歲。他於1521年之前與Elizabeth Covert結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1554年3月2日在英國倫敦享年54歲，埋葬在英國素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Goring于1500年出生在英国素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨时，他的父亲Sir John Goring IV30岁，母亲Constance Dyke25岁。他于1521年之前与Elizabeth Covert结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1554年3月2日在英国倫敦享年54岁，埋葬在英国素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨。

nameMeanings.name: Goring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Oxfordshire and West Sussex named Goring, from Old English Gāringas ‘people of Gāra’, a short form of various compound names with the first element gār ‘spear’.

variants.name: Goering
meanings: topographic name derived from Slavic gora ‘mountain, hill’. Compare Goring .

variants.name: Gorringe
meanings: English (Surrey and Suffolk): variant of   Goring  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Goring was born in 1500, in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, his father, Sir John Goring IV, was 30 and his mother, Constance Dyke, was 25. He married Elizabeth Covert before 1521. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 2 March 1554, in London, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Goring est né en 1500, à Burton with Coates, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Goring IV, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Constance Dyke, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Covert avant 1521. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 2 mars 1554, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Burton with Coates, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Goring 1500 in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Goring IV 30 und seine Mutter Constance Dyke 25. Er hat vor 1521 Elizabeth Covert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. März 1554 im Alter von 54 Jahren in London, England und wurde in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Goring è nato il nel 1500 nel Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir John Goring IV, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Constance Dyke, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Covert prima del 1521. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 2 marzo 1554, nel London, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Burton with Coates, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Goringが1500年にイギリススセックスブルトン ウィス コアツで生まれた時，父Sir John Goring IVは30歳，母Constance Dykeは25歳であった。1521年以前にElizabeth Covertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1554年3月2日にイギリスロンドンで54歳で死去し，イギリススセックスブルトン ウィス コアツにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Goring(이)가 1500년 영국 수세스 버턴 위스 코츠에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Goring IV(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance Dyke(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1521년 이전 Elizabeth Covert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1554년 3월 2일 영국 런던에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 버턴 위스 코츠에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Goring nasceu em 1500, em Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Goring IV, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Constance Dyke, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Covert antes 1521. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de março de 1554, em London, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Goring родился в 1500 г. в местности буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Goring IV было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance Dyke, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Covert перед 1521 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 2 марта 1554 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Goring nació en 1500, en Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Goring IV, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Constance Dyke, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Covert antes de 1521. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 2 de marzo de 1554, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra.
